top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to rise as oil holds at $76; Strait of Hormuz concerns ramp up
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Markets are set to make a loss for the week after the conflict in the Middle East returned to full-blown military action this week. The FTSE 100 has shed over one per cent and is on course to close in the red for the week, while Brent crude [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Carry Trades Face Best Conditions Since 2000, Goldman Says
top_signals.summary: Carry trades — one of the most widely-used strategies in the $9.5 trillion-per-day currency market — are seeing the most compelling backdrop in more than two decades, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs bleed again while ether funds snap a five-day inflow streak
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bayer Sells $3.4 Billion Stake in Contraceptives Arm to Apollo
top_signals.summary: Bayer AG sold a minority stake in its contraceptives business to Apollo Global Management Inc. for €3 billion ($3.4 billion) and will use the funds raised to improve its capital structure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HSBC seeks buyers for risky Hong Kong property loans
top_signals.summary: Intended sale of Hang Seng debt a sign of how UK bank will overhaul retail lender taken private this year
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU parliament passes ‘chat control,’ allowing private chat scans until 2028
top_signals.summary: EU lawmakers have again allowed tech firms to scan chats for abuse material, but exempted end-to-end encrypted messages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
top_signals.summary: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.
